title: Part 7 – Passage unique : e-mail de félicitations
instructions: Lisez l'e-mail, puis répondez aux questions.
passage:
From: David Park, CEO
To: All Staff
Subject: Congratulations on Reaching Our Annual Target

Dear Team,

I am delighted to share that, as of last Friday, we have officially reached our annual sales target of 10 million dollars — two months ahead of schedule.

This achievement is the result of the dedication and hard work of every member of our team, across all departments. I would like to extend a special thank you to the sales and operations teams, who worked extra hours in October and November to push us over the finish line.

As a token of appreciation, all employees will receive a one-time bonus equivalent to one week's salary, which will be included in December's payroll.

Thank you all again. Let's keep this momentum going into next year.

David Park
Chief Executive Officer

questions.prompt: What is the purpose of this email?
choices: To announce a new sales target
To inform staff of a company merger
To congratulate employees on reaching a target
To explain changes to the bonus policy
questions.explanation: David Park félicite son équipe d'avoir atteint l'objectif annuel de ventes.

questions.prompt: How early was the target reached?
What will employees receive as a reward?
choices: A one-time bonus of one week's salary
questions.explanation: "all employees will receive a one-time bonus equivalent to one week's salary".

questions.prompt: When will the bonus be paid?
questions.explanation: "which will be included in December's payroll".
